title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
summary_full: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.
summary_public: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.
